name: Get the list of serviceable Zips by Division

content.query:
SELECT distinct
brz.[Division]
,brz.[ZipCode]
,zip.City
,zip.County
,zip.State
,cast(PopulationEstimate as INT) as PopulationEstimate
,zip.[HouseholdsPerZipCode]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 left join [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS] zip on 
 brz.ZipCode = zip.ZipCode
 and zip.PrimaryRecord = 'P'
 order by 
 [Division], cast(PopulationEstimate as INT) desc

 -- 21086
